instruction: The red side stripe on this viewfinder circle icon drifted. Put it back exactly where it belongs. (very subtle — only 3px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/viewfinder-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M7.5 3.75H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3.75 6v1.5M16.5 3.75H18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 20.25 6v1.5m0 9V18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 20.25h-1.5m-9 0H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.75 18v-1.5M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="13" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/viewfinder-circle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M7.5 3.75H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3.75 6v1.5M16.5 3.75H18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 20.25 6v1.5m0 9V18A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 18 20.25h-1.5m-9 0H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3.75 18v-1.5M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
